
### diminishing returns: register delays 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/regDelayLat.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/regDelayLat.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/regDelayLat.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::


### diminishing returns: register delays 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/regDelayThru.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/regDelayThru.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
